name: Ursa
description: It is my spirit that keeps me safe, and not mere armor.

abilities.name: Maul
abilities.description: Grants bonus attack damage based on Ursa's current health. Current Health to Attack Damage Bonus: 1.25% (1.75%).

abilities.name: Earthshock
abilities.description: Applies stacks of Fury Swipes to all enemy units within the radius upon landing. Radius: 385 (685). Leap Distance: 250. Damage: 75/125/175/225. Move Speed Slow: 22%/28%/34%/40%. Slow Duration: 4. Leap Duration: 0.25. Cooldown: 15/13/11/9. Mana Cost: 95.

abilities.name: Overpower
abilities.description: Grants Ursa attack speed bonus and slow resistance bonus for a number of subsequent attacks. Attack Speed Bonus: 400. Number of Attacks: 3/4/5/6 (6/7/8/9). Slow Resist Bonus: 25%. Duration: 20. Cooldown: 12/11/10/9. Mana Cost: 45/50/55/60.

abilities.name: Fury Swipes
abilities.description: Consecutive attacks to the same enemy deals more damage. If the same target is not attacked after a period of time, the bonus damage is lost. Damage Bonus per Stack: 12/20/28/36 (18/26/34/42). Debuff Duration: 8/12/16/20 (17/21/25/29). Attack Damage Bonus per Stack: 12/20/28/36 (18/26/34/42). Debuff Duration: 8.

abilities.name: Enrage
abilities.description: Goes into a frenzy, removing all existing debuffs while providing damage reduction and status resistance. Enables Ursa to Enrage at his will, even while being disabled. Reduces cooldown. Damage Reduction: 80%. Status Resist Bonus: 50% (75%). Duration: 4/4.5/5. Cooldown: 60/45/30.
